fields.summary: Adding trans_metadata (note/created/modified) parsing to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in ext.py

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS (note/created/modered) handling in parse() before the assign/trimmed checks, added metadata dict param as new trailing arg to _make_node() which sets output_node.trans_metadata when non-empty. Also fixed comma-expectation check from 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' at top of parse loop so consecutive metadata params require commas like PR examples show. If your domain param also adds a new _make_node param, watch for signature/positional-arg conflicts when merging.

fields.summary: Done: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS (note/created/modered) handling in parse() before the assign/trimmed checks, added metadata dict param as new trailing arg to _make_node() which sets output_node.trans_metadata when non-empty. Also fixed comma-expectation check from 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' at top of parse loop so consecutive metadata params require commas like PR examples show. If your domain param also adds a new _make_node param, watch for signature/positional-arg conflicts when merging.
